title: 2025-2026 Academic Year The Announcement of International Student Admission Examination
content:
2025-2026 Academic Year The Announcement of International Student Admission Examination

2025-2026 Academic Year The Announcement of International Student Admission Examination

T.C.

The Announcement of International Student Admission Examination

The names of the candidate students, whose applications for İstanbul 29 Mayıs University International Student Quotas have been accepted and are invited for “International Student Admission Examination” on September 03, 2025, are as given below.

Relying upon the possibility of obtaining final registration right for our university, the candidate students have to bring the “The Documents Required for Final Registration Process”, when they come to the exam.

The candidate students have to be present to attend “International Student Admission Examination” at İstanbul 29 Mayıs University at 09:30 a.m., on September 03, 2025.

1-   Candidates invited for İstanbul 29 Mayıs University Foreign Student Selection Exam.
